mapper.insert:
insert into his_mirror_consume_link ( id, tenant_id, visit_kind, mirror_row_id, fetch_batch_id, dept_batch_consume_id, dept_batch_consume_entry_id, alloc_qty, create_time ) values
(#{e.id}, #{e.tenantId}, #{e.visitKind}, #{e.mirrorRowId}, #{e.fetchBatchId}, #{e.deptBatchConsumeId}, #{e.deptBatchConsumeEntryId}, #{e.allocQty}, #{e.createTime})
mapper.select: select coalesce(sum(l.alloc_qty), 0) from his_mirror_consume_link l where l.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and l.visit_kind = #{visitKind} and l.mirror_row_id = #{mirrorRowId}

select distinct ifnull(h.bill_source, '') from his_mirror_consume_link l inner join t_hc_ks_xh h on h.id = l.dept_batch_consume_id and ifnull(h.del_flag, 0) = 0 where l.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and l.visit_kind = #{visitKind} and l.mirror_row_id = #{mirrorRowId}
